name: keyerext
description: Type definitions and SDK for Keyer extensions

scripts.build: npm run build:esm && npm run build:cjs
scripts.build:cjs: tsc --module commonjs --outDir dist-cjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function copy(src,dest){const files=fs.readdirSync(src);files.forEach(f=>{const s=path.join(src,f);const d=path.join(dest,f.replace('.js','.cjs'));if(fs.statSync(s).isFile()&&f.endsWith('.js')){fs.copyFileSync(s,d)}})}copy('dist-cjs','dist')" && rm -rf dist-cjs
